Standing Desk Converter

Local fixture product page.

Reviews

Harper ★★★★★

Easy to set up. Makes it simple to alternate positions during the day.

Daniel ★★★★☆

Sturdy and stable. A bit heavy but that’s expected for the build.

Ella ★★★★☆

Plenty of surface area. Works well with my laptop and monitor.

Matthew ★★★☆☆

Good product overall. I wish the height adjustment was a bit smoother.
